step.name: inventory-tasks
step.action: List every task: name, trigger, payload shape, frequency, latency budget, failure consequence.

step.name: assign-names-and-idempotency
step.action: Pick `app.module.task` name. Decide idempotency strategy per task. Document choice.

step.name: set-retry-and-time-limits
step.action: Pick max_retries, retry_backoff, retry_jitter. Set soft_time_limit and time_limit from p95 measurements.

step.name: design-queue-topology
step.action: Assign tasks to queues (emails, reports, webhooks). Decide worker pool per queue.
step.decision-gate: If queue count > worker count, consolidate; if one queue dominates, split.

step.name: wire-dlq-and-alerts
step.action: Configure DLQ or failure-record table. Wire alerts (PagerDuty/Slack) on DLQ growth.
